description:
# Stack Plumbing

Add hooks, canUseTool, and disallowedTools to all type interfaces and wire them through ClaudeProvider. This is the foundational layer everything else depends on.

## Phases
1. Provider types and ClaudeProvider wiring
2. DynamicAgentExecutor and AgentTemplate wiring
title: [Epic] Stack Plumbing
